hero.title: 8 Days, Best of Kerala.
hero.titleAccent: The Complete Kerala Journey at Leisure.
hero.intro: Eight days to savour Kerala properly. Kochi, Munnar's tea, Thekkady's spice and wildlife, the backwaters, and the beaches. The full sweep of God's Own Country, unhurried.

breadcrumb.label: 8 Days Best of Kerala: Munnar & Thekkady

hero.heroImageAlt: Kerala tea hills and backwaters complete tour

overview.heading: 8 Days Best of Kerala: Munnar & Thekkady: The Full Picture
body: This is Kerala in full. Eight days gives you the coast, the tea hills, the spice plantations, the wildlife, the backwaters and a touch of beach, all at a relaxed pace that lets the state's gentle rhythm sink in.

Arranged privately from Malaysia, this 8 day Best of Kerala package links Fort Kochi, Munnar, Thekkady and the Alleppey backwaters, with room for Ayurveda, leisurely meals and the kind of slow travel Kerala does best. Your own vehicle and driver guide make every transition smooth.

highlights.heading: Why Travellers from Malaysia Love This Trip

items.title: Munnar & Thekkady
items.body: The tea hills of Munnar and the spice country and wildlife of Thekkady, with a Periyar Lake cruise, form the cool, green heart of the trip.

items.title: Backwaters & Houseboat
items.body: An overnight houseboat on the Alleppey backwaters, with onboard meals and a peaceful night drifting through the canals.

items.title: Heritage, Ayurveda & Leisure
items.body: Fort Kochi's heritage, time for an Ayurvedic treatment, and the breathing room to actually relax. Eight days lets Kerala unfold at its own pace.

days.title: Arrive Kochi
days.description: Met at Cochin airport and transferred to your hotel. Evening at the fishing nets.

days.title: Fort Kochi Heritage
days.description: A full day exploring the old harbour quarter and a Kathakali show.
suggestedActivities: St Francis Church and Dutch Palace

days.title: Kochi to Munnar
days.description: Scenic drive to the tea hills.

days.title: Munnar Sightseeing
days.description: A full day among the tea estates and viewpoints.

days.title: Munnar to Thekkady
days.description: Drive to the spice hills of Thekkady.

days.title: Thekkady to Alleppey
days.description: Spice plantation walk, then descend to the backwaters.

days.title: Alleppey Houseboat
days.description: Board your private houseboat for an overnight backwater cruise.

days.title: Disembark, Depart
days.description: Morning cruise, then transfer to Cochin airport for your onward flight.

hotelOptions.heading: Choose Your Comfort Level
hotelOptions.subheading: Centrally located hotels with easy access to the main sights. Pick the tier that suits your style.

whyBook.heading: Kerala in Full, Done at Leisure
whyBook.body: Eight days is the ideal length to enjoy Kerala without rushing, and we build in the relaxation, wellness and slow travel that make it special. Dhesu has arranged Kerala holidays for over 35 years.

points.title: MATTA & IATA Registered
points.body: Fully licensed Malaysian travel agency. We guide you through India e-Visa documentation with every booking.

points.title: Private Tours, Daily Departures
points.body: No minimum group to wait for. Your trip runs on your dates, your pace, your own vehicle and guide.

points.title: A Real Team to Call
points.body: Reachable throughout your trip. Flight delayed, your guide waits. Plans change, we adapt on the ground.

points.title: Group & Custom Pricing
points.body: Travelling as a family or group lowers the per-person cost. Ask us for a tailored quote.

sections.heading: 8 Day Best of Kerala Tour from Malaysia
sections.body:
This is the most complete Kerala package, covering Kochi, Munnar, Thekkady and the backwaters at a relaxed eight-day pace. It is ideal for travellers who want to experience the full range of the state without hurrying.

The extra days mean time for a Kathakali show, an Ayurvedic treatment, and simply enjoying the scenery and food. A private vehicle and driver guide make it effortless.

For a southern extension to the tip of India, see our 9 day Kerala plus Kanyakumari package.

sections.heading: Why Choose the 8 Day Kerala Tour
sections.body:
Shorter Kerala trips have to choose between the hills, the wildlife and the backwaters. Eight days lets you have it all, with breathing room.

You get Munnar's tea, Thekkady's spice and Periyar wildlife, the Alleppey houseboat, Fort Kochi's heritage, and the chance to add Ayurveda or beach time. It is Kerala at its most rewarding.

items.question: Do Malaysians need a visa for India?
items.answer: Yes. Malaysian passport holders apply for an India e-Visa online before departure. The tourist e-Visa covers tourism and short visits and is valid for 30 days from entry. The application is on the official India e-Visa portal, and Dhesu walks you through it when you book. Visa fees are not included in the package price.

items.question: Which airport does this trip use?
items.answer: This is a land-only package: hotels, transfers, tours and guide are included, but international flights are not. Most Malaysian travellers fly from Kuala Lumpur International Airport (KLIA) to Cochin International Airport (COK). We can recommend suitable flights and timings on request.

items.question: What is the best time for an 8 day Kerala tour?
items.answer: September to March offers the most pleasant weather across the coast, hills and backwaters. Munnar and Thekkady stay cool. The monsoon brings lush greenery but heavy rain that can affect hill roads.

items.question: Can I add beach time or Ayurveda?
items.answer: Yes. The relaxed 8 day pace leaves room for an Ayurvedic treatment or a beach stop such as Kovalam or Marari. We can tailor the itinerary to include wellness or beach days. Let us know when booking.

items.question: How much driving does this involve?
items.answer: There are several scenic drives between Kochi, Munnar, Thekkady and Alleppey, each a few hours through beautiful country. The private vehicle makes them comfortable, and the eight-day pace means no single day feels rushed.
